---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# exculding momentum

* get shadows of subsystem

```{julia}
# calibration 
using NPZ
calibration_data = npzread("./04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz")
calibration_vec = calibration_data["calibration"]
```

```{julia}
# product shadows of subsystem.
using RandomMeas
N = 6
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
subrange = [1, 2];
subgroup = reduce_to_subsystem(measurement_group, subrange);
#sub_dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(subgroup, G=calibration_vec[subrange]);
sub_dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(subgroup);
```

## trace

```{julia}
# tr(ρ)
#@show estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 1, compute_sem = true); # Cross-validation, but it consumes a lot of memory.
@show estimate = get_trace_moment(sub_dense_shadows, 1);
```

```{julia}
# tr(ρ^2)
#@show estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 2, compute_sem = true);
@show estimate = get_trace_moment(sub_dense_shadows, 2);
```

```{julia}
# multiply
multiply(sub_dense_shadows[1], sub_dense_shadows[1]);
```
